title: Gift Card Fraud
description: How can I protect myself from gift card scams and understand the vulnerabilities of barcode‑based gift cards?
narrative: The user seeks detailed information on the security weaknesses of bar‑coded gift cards, the techniques fraudsters use to clone or exploit them, and practical measures to prevent or mitigate such fraud. Relevant material should describe the flaw in barcode‑only cards, how hackers photograph and reproduce them, and recommended countermeasures (e.g., chip or magnetic stripe upgrades). Content that merely lists gift‑card products, promotional offers, or unrelated apps is not relevant.
